title: Storage
content:
# Storage

The storage location of the data. `node-and-cloud` means that the data is stored in the node and in the cloud. `node` means that the data is stored only in the node. `none` means that the data is not stored.

## Enum Values

- `node-and-cloud`
- `node`
- `none`
summary: The storage location of the data. `node-and-cloud` means that the data is stored in the node and in the cloud. `node` means that the data is stored only in the node. `none` means that the data is not stored.
